outfit_info.occasion: Black Tie Event, Gala, Formal Dinner
outfit_info.outfit_description: A classic black tuxedo ensemble exudes refined elegance, featuring a crisp white shirt and a polished bow tie. The dark velvet loafers add a luxurious touch, creating a sharp and sophisticated look perfect for formal occasions. The silhouette is clean and tailored.

model_attributes.body: The model possesses a slender and well-proportioned physique, standing with a poised and upright demeanor, conveying confidence.
model_attributes.pose: The model stands in a full-body, static pose, facing slightly to the side, showcasing the outfit's complete silhouette.
model_attributes.background: A minimalist light grey studio background provides a clean, neutral canvas, allowing full focus on the meticulously styled outfit.
